prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.2L CRDi diesel (D4HB engine code) turbocharger with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 (0.86 A/R turbine housing) for a targeted 320 hp and 550 lb-ft of torque, paired with a custom 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust featuring a MagnaFlow 17299 stainless steel muffler and 4-inch downpipe with a GESI high-flow catalytic converter (200 cell) to maintain emissions compliance.

Fuel System: Upgrade the stock fuel injectors to Denso G4S 1050cc injectors, coupled with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (PN: 20-0119) and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F90000267) to support the increased airflow. Add a Snow Performance Stage 3 methanol injection kit (PN: 31033) with a 5-gallon reservoir for charge cooling and detonation control.

Suspension & Handling: Install a full KW Suspensions Clubsport coilover kit (PN: 35231001) with 8-position adjustable rebound damping and 16-way adjustable compression, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to correct scrub radius. Replace the stock sway bars with Ultra Racing front (24mm) and rear (22mm) sway bars (PN: UR-AR19-2422) to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Seibon Carbon fiber widebody kit (Sorento X-Line specific, PN: KIA-SORENTO-XLINE-WB) with integrated carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Add a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber roof spoiler (designed via CAD for the X-Line’s roofline) and a Varis Japan rear wing (adjustable angle, 3-piece design) for downforce.

Wheels & Tires: Mount a set of WORK Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x10 +25 front, 19x11 +30 rear) in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Use Project Kics R40 lug nuts (M14x1.5, closed-end) and DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track-ready stopping power.

Exterior & Lighting: Apply a full 3M Matte Military Green (PN: 35473) vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat overlay. Replace the stock headlights with Morimoto XB LED projectors (D2S bulbs) and add a custom LED light bar integrated into the lower grille (Oracle Lighting 6-inch RGBW, PN: 5876-007). Tint the windows with Llumar IRX 70% ceramic film (PN: IRX70PSUV) for heat rejection.
